name: Sample fixture — 6m² gritstone breach repair (Brink Farm-style)
description: Synthetic fixture demonstrating the schema. Replace photos/ and groundTruth values with a real saved job before relying on it. Without real photos, `npm run regression -- --fixture sample` will fail with 'photo missing' — that's by design; this file is the worked example, not a runnable test.

inputs.briefNotes: Six-metre stretch of double-faced gritstone field wall has collapsed after heavy rain. Stone is scattered at the base, mostly reclaimable. No mortar in the original — dry-laid throughout. Access via field gate, no scaffold needed.
inputs.scaleReferences: The wooden field gate to the left is 1.2m wide; use as scale anchor.
